scripts.test:challenge: npm run build && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-challenge FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:5001 firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions --project demo-runiac-challenge "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/challengeCatalog.test.js lib/test/challengeStateMachine.test.js lib/test/challengeExpiry.test.js lib/test/challengeLobby.test.js lib/test/challengeCallableSurface.test.js lib/test/challengeContribution.test.js lib/test/challengeSettlement.test.js lib/test/challengeNotifications.test.js"
scripts.test:friends: npm run build && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-friends FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-runiac-friends "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/friendsCore.test.js"
scripts.test: npm run build && RUNIAC_HOME_GUIDE_FAKE_PROVIDER=deterministic firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore --project runiac-functions-test "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/progressionCalculator.test.js lib/test/progressionAuditHelpers.test.js lib/test/roles.test.js lib/test/accountStatus.test.js lib/test/subscriptionExpiry.test.js lib/test/streakExpiry.test.js lib/test/completeRun.test.js lib/test/planProgressCompletion.test.js lib/test/completeCoolDown.test.js lib/test/completeRunCallableSurface.test.js lib/test/monthlyLeaderboard.test.js lib/test/monthlyLeaderboardWriter.test.js lib/test/leaderboardAdminCommand.test.js lib/test/leaderboardMockDataset.test.js lib/test/leaderboardSeedFirestore.test.js lib/test/leaderboardSeedVerification.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardInventory.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardMockData.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardSafety.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardCleanup.test.js lib/test/leaderboardSeedAuthorization.test.js lib/test/notificationDevices.test.js lib/test/notificationDispatch.test.js lib/test/notificationScheduledDispatch.test.js lib/test/homeGuideEvidence.test.js lib/test/homeGuideModel.test.js lib/test/homeGuideGeneratedCopyPolicy.test.js lib/test/homeGuideQuotaCache.test.js lib/test/homeGuideAgentSurface.test.js lib/test/homeGuideConsent.test.js lib/test/homeGuideAgentCallableSurface.test.js lib/test/submitFeedback.test.js lib/test/reportAppError.test.js lib/test/backendErrorReporting.test.js lib/test/feedAuthorLevels.test.js lib/test/friendLevels.test.js lib/test/configLoader.test.js lib/test/automationGate.test.js" && npm run test:feed && npm run test:moderation
scripts.test:feed: npm run build && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-feed FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:5001 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions,storage --project demo-runiac-feed "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/feedCallableSurface.test.js lib/test/feedContracts.test.js lib/test/feedEngagement.test.js lib/test/feedFixtureGuard.test.js lib/test/feedLifecycle.test.js lib/test/feedPublishCore.test.js lib/test/feedThumbnailCore.test.js lib/test/feedEmulatorIntegration.test.js"
scripts.test:moderation: npm run build && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-moderation FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:5001 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions,storage --project demo-runiac-moderation "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/moderationCommand.test.js lib/test/reportAutomation.test.js lib/test/staleReportSweep.test.js lib/test/errorGroupNotifications.test.js"
scripts.feed:fixtures:emulator: npm run build && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-feed FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:5001 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 node lib/src/feed/fixtures/cli.js
scripts.leaderboard:seed:emulator: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore --project runiac-functions-test "node lib/src/leaderboard/seedLeaderboardMockData.js --project runiac-functions-test --period 2026-07 --run-id leaderboard-je-emulator-local --region-id jurong-east --users-per-region 100 --lifecycle"
